zh.Prince George's, Maryland, British Colon: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰普林斯 格奧智也斯

zh.lifeSummary: Mary Pigman於1669年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加马里兰普林斯 格奧智也斯。她和Philip Mason至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1715年在她的家鄉享年46歲。

nameMeanings.name: Pigman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of EnglishPickman, a variant of Picker 1–3.

variants.name: Picker
meanings: English: occupational name, probably ‘one who works with a pick or pickaxe’, from Middle English piker.
English: perhaps sometimes a nickname from Middle English piker ‘thief’.
South German: occupational name for someone who used a pick or pickaxe, for instance a miner, from an agent derivative of Middle High German bicken, picken ‘to prick or stab’. Compare Pickar .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries - 1696: Prince George's, Maryland Colony, British Colonial America; 1776: Prince George's, Maryland, United States; 1791: Prince George's MD, Maryland, United States; 1801: Prince George's, Maryland, United States

en.lifeSummary: Mary Pigman was born in 1669, in Prince George's, Maryland, British Colonial America. She had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Philip Mason. She died in 1715, in her hometown, at the age of 46.

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Pigman(은)는 1669년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 메릴랜드 주 프린스 조그'스에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Philip Mason(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1715년 그녀의 고향에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.
